headline: CTC Global Appoints Jonathon Stevens as Chief Financial Officer
summary: IRVINE, Calif., June 18, 2026--CTC Global, the world’s leading developer and manufacturer of high-capacity advanced conductors, today announced the appointment of Jonathon Stevens as Chief Financial Officer. In this role, Mr. Stevens will lead CTC Global’s financial strategy, supporting the company’s continued growth and expansion of its advanced transmission technologies to utilities across the United States and around the world.
